Index.title: Instead DeFi | Lending and Tokenization in one Platform
Index.description: Instead Finance is a complete DeFi ecosystem for lending, borrowing, and no-code token creation across 7+ EVM networks.
Index.hero_title: The Future of DeFi is Here
Index.hero_subtitle: Lend, borrow, and tokenize with institutional-grade security and consumer-grade simplicity.
Index.lending_desc: Maximize your capital efficiency. Deposit collateral and borrow against it with instant liquidity.
Index.factory_desc: Launch your own ERC-20 token in minutes. No coding required, audit-ready, and multi-chain support.
